action.reasoning: Observation: Starting with empty workspace, data at /data (unified_train.jsonl ~7100 rows with absolute pixel coords, instructions, optional bbox/point, images), base Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct available offline. No prior training or eval. Analysis: Must establish working pipeline immediately per guidelines (few epochs + submit_eval in iter 0) to measure time/validate predict contract before longer runs. Qwen2.5-VL uses special <box>x1 y1 x2 y2</box> or <point>x y</point> tokens on 1000x1000 grid; training data must be converted from abs pixels to this grid and formatted as chat for SFT. Predict must reverse-scale outputs to abs pixels + clip. Decision: First inspect data format with command, install peft+trl for LoRA SFT, write minimal train.py (load processor+model from local path, convert ~200 train samples to 1000-grid targets, LoRA on lm_head+attn with 1 epoch very small bs for speed), write predict.py (load from ckpt, process test_prompts one-by-one, generate, parse box/point with regex fallback, rescale+clip, output json). Run short train then submit_eval for baseline.
